summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ChiPi Link community super app - core flows working, some API endpoints missing

flaky_endpoints.workaround: Endpoints may be using different paths

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 404 errors causing dashboard data loading failures
flaky_endpoints.workaround: PinPanClub page loads but with empty data

integration_issues.issue: API calls returning 404, causing empty dashboard stats

passed_tests: Admin login with teck@koh.one/Acdb##0897 returns JWT token
Admin dashboard loads with sidebar after login
Landing page loads with ChiPi Link branding
Public login shows ONLY LaoPan OAuth button (no email form)
PinPanClub page loads with competition hub layout
Mobile responsive design - no horizontal overflow at 375px
Admin protected route /api/auth-v2/me returns admin user info
action_item_for_main_agent: Some API endpoints (community/landing, pinpanclub dashboard data) return 404. May need to check endpoint paths or implement missing endpoints. Overall core flows are working well.
